NWS_014.audience: dog owners with brown spots and damaged grass in their yard
NWS_014.angle: fix dog urine lawn damage at the soil level, not with green dye
NWS_014.tone: warm, friendly, dog-lover to dog-lover; honest, no hype
NWS_014.cta: Find the Dog Urine Neutralizer & Lawn Revitalizer at Nature's Way Soil.
hooks: Love your dog, just not the brown spots they leave behind? Let's fix that.
Those yellow-brown patches in the yard start down in the soil, not on the grass.
If green dyes never really fixed your dog spots, here's a different way to go.

scenes.name: Problem
scenes.voiceover: We love our dogs. Those brown spots they leave in the yard, not so much. And the truth is, that damage starts down in the soil.
scenes.brollQuery: dog sitting on green lawn backyard
scenes.caption: LOVE THE DOG, NOT THE SPOTS

scenes.name: Product
scenes.voiceover: Nature's Way Soil Dog Urine Neutralizer is a naturally dark, enzyme and humic-acid lawn treatment. No green dye, no instant cover-up.
scenes.caption: NOT A DYE

scenes.name: How it works
scenes.voiceover: The enzymes help break down the urine salts and waste left behind, while humic and fulvic acids help your soil recover so grass can grow back.
scenes.brollQuery: healthy grass roots soil close up
scenes.caption: WORKS IN THE SOIL

scenes.name: Pet safe
scenes.voiceover: It also helps neutralize the odors and scent markers that keep bringing your dog back to the same spot, and it's made to be pet-safe and lawn-safe, with no bleach or ammonia.
scenes.caption: PET-SAFE & LAWN-SAFE

scenes.name: CTA
scenes.voiceover: Soak the spot, give it a little time, and let your lawn rebuild. Find the Dog Urine Neutralizer and Lawn Revitalizer at Nature's Way Soil.
scenes.caption: NATURE'S WAY SOIL

NWS_026.cta: See the Lawn & Soil Recovery System at Nature's Way Soil.
hooks: Yellowing, tired-looking lawn? The fix might be in the soil, not the fertilizer.
Before you dump more nitrogen on it, give your soil what it's actually missing.
Stronger roots make a greener lawn, and that starts underground.

scenes.name: Problem
scenes.voiceover: If your lawn looks yellow and worn out no matter what you feed it, the real issue is usually down in the soil.
scenes.caption: TIRED, YELLOW LAWN?

scenes.name: Product
scenes.voiceover: The Nature's Way Soil Lawn and Soil Recovery System is a simple liquid blend of humic acid, fulvic acid, and organic kelp.
scenes.caption: HUMIC, FULVIC & KELP

scenes.name: How it works
scenes.voiceover: It works as a natural soil conditioner, improving soil structure, helping nutrients become more available, and supporting stronger, healthier roots.
scenes.caption: CONDITIONS THE SOIL

scenes.name: Easy to use
scenes.voiceover: Just mix about two ounces per gallon of water. One gallon of concentrate covers a lot of ground, and it's good for lawns, gardens, and pastures alike.
scenes.caption: MIX 2 OZ / GALLON

scenes.name: CTA
scenes.voiceover: Feed the soil, and the green tends to follow. See the Lawn and Soil Recovery System at Nature's Way Soil.
scenes.caption: NATURE'S WAY SOIL

NWS_027.cta: See the Liquid Biochar Soil Conditioner at Nature's Way Soil.
hooks: Sandy or worn-out soil that just won't hold water? Biochar can help.
Think of it like a microscopic sponge for your soil.
Healthy soil starts with healthy biology. Here's how to feed it.

scenes.name: Problem
scenes.voiceover: If your soil dries out fast or just feels worn out, it's probably struggling to hold onto water and nutrients.
scenes.caption: SOIL WON'T HOLD WATER?

scenes.name: Product
scenes.voiceover: Nature's Way Soil Liquid Biochar is a concentrated soil conditioner, activated biochar with humic acid, fulvic acid, and kelp.
scenes.caption: ACTIVATED LIQUID BIOCHAR

scenes.name: How it works
scenes.voiceover: The biochar works like a microscopic sponge, helping your soil hold water and nutrients instead of letting them leach away, especially in sandy or depleted ground.
scenes.caption: LIKE A SOIL SPONGE

scenes.name: Versatile
scenes.voiceover: It also helps feed the beneficial life in your soil, and one concentrate handles a lot, a soil drench, compost tea booster, transplant solution, or all-around conditioner.
scenes.caption: ONE BOTTLE, MANY USES

scenes.name: CTA
scenes.voiceover: Build your soil from the ground up. See Liquid Biochar at Nature's Way Soil.
